subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team. We'd be happy to schedule an introductory call to discuss potential synergies between our product roadmaps.

We have the following slots available for a 2-hour meeting next week:
- Tuesday, April 21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Wednesday, April 22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Thursday, April 23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, and we'll send a calendar invitation with the meeting link.

Regarding your request for internal contact information, we are unable to share internal contact details at this stage of our discussions. All initial collaboration conversations will be coordinated through this email thread, and we will involve the appropriate team members as needed.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Collaboration Team
